message.content:
@startuml
!define APPLICATION "Application"
!define C "C"
!define readFile "void readFile()"
!define sortMap "void sortMap()"
!define generateOutput "String generateOutput()"

rectangle "APPLICATION" as Application {
  circle "C" as C
  Application -- C
  Application -- readFile
  Application -- sortMap
  Application -- generateOutput
}

@enduml
